hero.title: Career Planner
hero.description: Plan career goals, roadmaps, milestones, and review activity in one clear workflow.

differences.title: Connect career direction to practical progress
differences.description: Career Planner keeps goals, roadmaps, milestones, and review history together in an owner-scoped workspace.

items.title: Career goals
items.description: Define the outcomes and roles you want to pursue.

items.title: Roadmaps
items.description: Organize goal work into focused development paths.

items.title: Milestones
items.description: Break each roadmap into measurable checkpoints.

feel.title: A clearer way to manage career growth
feel.description: The workflow turns a broad ambition into organized goals, roadmaps, milestones, and review notes.

items.title: Set the direction
items.description: Create the career goal and target role.

items.title: Map the work
items.description: Build roadmaps for skills, experience, networking, or portfolio growth.

items.title: Review progress
items.description: Log changes and completion activity as the plan evolves.

audiences.title: Who uses Career Planner
audiences.description: Useful for people planning structured professional development.

items.title: Students
items.description: Plan the path toward an intended role.

items.title: Job seekers
items.description: Organize skill, portfolio, and application-readiness work.

items.title: Professionals
items.description: Track growth goals and role progression over time.

resourceSection.title: Career-planning essentials
resourceSection.description: Keep goals, roadmaps, milestones, and reviews connected.

items.title: Roadmaps
items.description: Group focused work under each goal.

items.title: Milestones
items.description: Track ordered checkpoints and success metrics.

groupedSection.title: Build a practical career path
groupedSection.description: Move from direction to progress with structured records.

items.name: Career goal
items.description: Clarify the role or professional outcome.

items.name: Roadmap
items.description: Create focused paths that support the goal.

items.name: Milestone
items.description: Set checkpoints with status and success metrics.

items.name: Review
items.description: Record planning, completion, pause, or archive activity.

technicalSection.title: Designed for career development planning
technicalSection.description: Career Planner follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.
items: Owner-scoped goals, roadmaps, milestones, and review history.

finalCta.title: Explore a clearer career path
finalCta.description: Open Career Planner to start with goals and move through the workflow.
